data.name: Milfvania Ep. 3
data.detailed_description:
The final episode of the series. While Ep. 1 and 2 contained an introduction and rising action, this final installment has the highest point of tension in the storyline, where the MC faces the truth and makes an important choice (building a harem around his landlady, her daughters, and female neighbors).

After being falsely accused by a girl named Julie, the main character narrowly avoids prison thanks to his influential father, who sends him to live abroad with an ex-girlfriend to keep him out of trouble.

Now living in a cramped apartment with his landlady Lidia and her two daughters—Nastya and Olga—the MC finds himself surrounded by broken relationships. Nastya is stuck with a drug addict, Olga’s with a wannabe gangster. Both are unhappy, and both are vulnerable.

Using his intelligence, charm, and manipulation, the MC slowly inserts himself into their lives, pulling them away from their boyfriends and toward him. All of this happens under the nose of their mother, Lidia—lonely, alcoholic, and emotionally unstable. She doesn’t find him attractive, so he creates a masked persona to seduce her in secret. It works. She falls in love with the fake version of him and, not knowing who he really is, even wants to share him with her daughters.

As the story unfolds, the MC starts to realize that everyone around him is hiding something, wearing masks just like he is. Julie is still blackmailing him from afar, and people who seem innocent aren’t always what they appear.

At the same time, he tries to have a normal relationship with a kind, religious neighbor named Dilara. But things spiral again when her lonely mother, Faiza, betrays her daughter and makes a move on the MC—behind her husband’s back.

Masks of Deceit is a dark, story-driven game about manipulation, power, and human weakness. It’s not about saving the world or being a hero. It’s about how far you’ll go when you’re cornered—and what kind of person you become when you realize no one’s really innocent.

More details will be added as the development progresses.

  • Immersive 3D atmosphere

  • Lively backgrounds and characters (aniamted, blinking etc.)

  • Classically animated adult scenes with life imitating realism

  • Cutscenes and fully animated adult scenes

  • Heavy focus on character manipulation and social influence

  • Dialogue and choices that impact relationships and outcomes

  • Multiple storylines and hidden consequences

  • No heroes. Just people using each other to survive

Animations sample

Seducing the landlady disguised as a priest

Seducing the mom of Igor

Milfvania tells the story of a young guy who got into trouble because of a girl (Julie) recruited for an amateur porn video. As a result, his father tells him it's better to move abroad. he had to move abroad, somewhere in post-Soviet Europe. There he met his landlady (Lidia) and her two daughters. But soon after, Julie follows him, and all the wicked and devilish things she does will turn out for the best.

Episodes can be played in any order, as they each encapsulate fantasies on their own.

The milfs

The girls your age

The enemies

  • netori: the protagonist (MC) takes away someone else's love interest
    ]*]corruption

  • anal sex

  • harem

  • pregnancy

  • sex in front of others

  • cheating

  • Q:Why episodes? A: It wasn't meant to be that long and my art style / animation evolved through years.

  • Q:Will Ep. 1 & 2 get revamped with the new style? A: Yes, they will be updated to match the style of Ep. 3. And more content will be added to those.

  • Q:Is Ep. 3 longer than 1 & 2? A: Yes, way longer. I took notice of your complaints and I will deliver all the story inside Ep. 3.

  • Q:Any new mechanics? A: Yes, I'm currently developing a technique to make the animated scenes more interactive and easier to switch between.

  • Q:Any news in terms of animations? A: Yes, I plan to make the scenes fully animated.

data.short_description: Encompass the whole story in this largest and final episode. Graduate from the so-called "KGB University" by building your harem. Don't mind the atmospheric, decaying background. The girls will make up for it!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0 or DirectX 11
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
